diagrams.title: ALU Block Diagram with Functional Units
diagrams.description: Shows the internal organization of a typical ALU with arithmetic unit, logic unit, and shifter connected to a multiplexer for output selection
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how different ALU components are integrated and selected based on operation code

diagrams.title: Full Adder Circuit for Bit Addition
diagrams.description: Basic building block of arithmetic circuit showing sum and carry generation for 1-bit addition
elements: Sum Output (S = A XOR B XOR Cin)
Carry Output (Cout = (A AND B) OR (Cin AND (A XOR B)))
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how individual bits are added and how carry propagates in multi-bit addition

diagrams.title: Status Flags Register (Condition Codes)
diagrams.description: Register storing status flags set by ALU after each operation, used for conditional branching
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how ALU communicates result characteristics to control unit for conditional operations

diagrams.title: MUX-Based ALU Output Selection
diagrams.description: Multiplexer selecting output from one of the functional units based on operation select lines
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how the correct functional unit output is selected for different operations
